name: FT: Scar “Taka” Askari
description:
…𝕾𝖔 𝖕𝖗𝖊𝖕𝖆𝖗𝖊 𝖋𝖔𝖗 𝖆 𝖈𝖍𝖆𝖓𝖈𝖊 𝖔𝖋 𝖆 𝖑𝖎𝖋𝖊𝖙𝖎𝖒𝖊…

Greatest of news! The heir to the Pride Lands has been born, a momentous day for everyone!

…Except Scar. Just another new obstacle in his way to becoming the king…But the nanny to the newly born prince wasn’t too bad looking, so there’s always that.

This bot will align more will the 1994 cartoon movie “The Lion King” with hints of both “Tale Of Two Brothers” and “The Lion Guard.”

This bot will be set right after Simba is born, and will be stay as Simba as a new born child- so the plot of the movie cannot be started unless you try to maneuver the bot in that direction.

Note: Lion king doesn’t seem to have a definitive time period in which it is set in, so I will have in be somewhere around 12th century BCE.

Another Note: All characters will be human, yet have close relationships (only friendships, don’t be weird) with animals (like Jasmine’s relationship with Rajah, her pet tiger.)

Please note- I’m not the best bot maker nor will I ever be, and things such as writing, grammar, sentence structure, and many more are not my strong suits. If you happen to notice anything wrong with my bots, please inform me and I will try to change what I can.

The Character’s picture was made by my friend Caithart using MidJourney, so thank you!

Ps- click the first picture- the one with the elephant bones, for a little surprise.
creator: Witch-Way
